scripts.build: bun run paraglide:compile && bun run clean:build-cache && NODE_OPTIONS=${NODE_OPTIONS:---max-old-space-size=16384} BUILD_CONCURRENCY=${BUILD_CONCURRENCY:-1} UV_THREADPOOL_SIZE=${UV_THREADPOOL_SIZE:-16} astro build && rm -rf dist/.prerender
scripts.check: bun run validate:agent-skills && bun run paraglide:compile && astro check
scripts.preview: bun run build && bun run preview:worker
